WITH arrayFilter( x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') IN ('user', 'assistant'), splitByChar('\n', cs.content) ) AS _interaction_lines, arrayFilter(x -> JSONHas(x, 'timestamp'), _interaction_lines) AS _ts_lines, arrayMap( x -> parseDateTime64BestEffort(JSONExtractString(x, 'timestamp')), _ts_lines ) AS _timestamps, arrayMap( x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type'), _ts_lines ) AS _msg_types, if(length(_timestamps) > 1, arrayMap(i -> dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), range(1, length(_timestamps))), [] ) AS _prompt_periods_sec, if(length(_timestamps) > 1, arrayMap(i -> if(_msg_types[i] = 'user' AND _msg_types[i+1] = 'assistant', dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), 0), range(1, length(_timestamps))), [] ) AS _inference_gaps, if(length(_timestamps) > 1, arrayMap(i -> if(_msg_types[i] = 'assistant' AND _msg_types[i+1] = 'user', dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), 0), range(1, length(_timestamps))), [] ) AS _human_gaps, arrayFilter( x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant' AND JSONHas(x, 'message'), splitByChar('\n', cs.content) ) AS _assistant_lines, arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _input_tokens, arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'output_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _output_tokens, arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_read_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_read, arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_creation_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_creation, arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '"name":"Skill"[^}]*"skill":"([^"]+)"'))) AS _skills, arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '"name":"Task"[^}]*"subagent_type":"([^"]+)"'))) AS _subagent_types, arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '<command-name>/([^<]+)</command-name>'))) AS _slash_commands, arrayMin(_timestamps) AS _session_date, arrayMax(_timestamps) AS _last_interaction_date, dateDiff('minute', _session_date, _last_interaction_date) AS _duration_min SELECT *, _session_date as session_date, _last_interaction_date as last_interaction_date, _input_tokens as input_tokens, _output_tokens as output_tokens, _cache_read as cache_read_input_tokens, _cache_creation as cache_creation_input_tokens, _input_tokens + _output_tokens as total_tokens, _skills as skills, _slash_commands as slash_commands, _subagent_types as subagent_types, toUInt32(length(_timestamps)) as total_interactions, toUInt32(_duration_min) as actual_duration_min, if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, round(arrayAvg(_prompt_periods_sec), 2), 0) as avg_period_sec, if( length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, toFloat64(arrayElement( arraySort(_prompt_periods_sec), toUInt64(ceil(length(_prompt_periods_sec) / 2)) )), 0 ) as median_period_sec, toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x < 5, _prompt_periods_sec)) as quick_responses, toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x >= 5 AND x <= 60, _prompt_periods_sec)) as normal_responses, toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x > 300, _prompt_periods_sec)) as long_pauses, toUInt32( length(extractAll(cs.content, '"isApiErrorMessage":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '"is_error":true')) ) as error_count, JSONExtractString( JSONExtractRaw( arrayElement( arrayFilter( x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant', splitByChar('\n', cs.content) ), -1 ), 'message' ), 'model' ) as model_used, toUInt8(if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 1, 0)) as has_commit, toUInt8(if(position(cs.content, '"name":"EnterPlanMode"') > 0, 1, 0)) as used_plan_mode, toUInt32(arraySum(_inference_gaps)) as inference_duration_sec, toUInt32(arraySum(_human_gaps)) as human_duration_sec, CASE WHEN _duration_min <= 10 AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) < 500000 AND _output_tokens > 1000 THEN 'quick_win' WHEN _duration_min > 30 AND _output_tokens > 50000 AND cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '' THEN 'deep_work' WHEN (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1000000 AND (_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) < 0.3 AND _duration_min > 20 THEN 'struggle' WHEN length(_skills) >= 3 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = '') AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 200000 THEN 'exploration' WHEN _duration_min < 3 AND _output_tokens < 500 THEN 'abandoned' ELSE 'standard' END as session_archetype, toUInt8(round( 50 + (if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 20, 0)) + (if((_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) > 0.5, 15, 0)) + (least(toUInt32(length(_skills)), 3) * 5) - (if((_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1500000 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = ''), 20, 0)) - (if(_duration_min < 2 AND _output_tokens < 200, 30, 0)) - (least(toUInt32( length(extractAll(cs.content, '"isApiErrorMessage":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '"is_error":true')) ), 10) * 2) )) as success_score FROM rudel.claude_sessions AS cs WHERE length(_timestamps) > 0 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.session_id ORDER BY cs.ingested_at DESC) = 1;

The migration is failing because the MV SELECT query outputs a column named `cs.session_date` (from the `_session_date as session_date` alias getting prefixed with the table alias `cs` from `SELECT *`). The issue is that `SELECT *` from `rudel.claude_sessions AS cs` will output columns prefixed with `cs.` but the target table `session_analytics` expects plain column names.

Wait, actually the issue is different. Let me look more carefully at the migration SQL. The MV does:

```sql
SELECT *, _session_date as session_date, ...
FROM rudel.claude_sessions AS cs


```

So when ClickHouse expands `SELECT *` with the table alias, it's prefixing the column names with `cs.`, which means the output includes both the aliased columns from the source table and the new `session_date` alias, but the target table is expecting unprefixed column names.

```
I think the real issue is that `_session_date` is defined in the WITH clause as `arrayMin(_timestamps)`, and then the SELECT tries to alias it as `session_date`. But if `claude_sessions` already has a `session_date` column from the recent infrastructure change, the `SELECT *` pulls that in, creating a conflict. The error mentioning `cs.session_date` suggests ClickHouse is getting confused about which `session_date` to use—the one from the table or the computed one.
```

    98→	as: `
    99→  WITH
   100→    arrayFilter(

   102→      splitByChar('\\n', cs.content)
   103→    ) AS _interaction_lines,

   131→      []
   132→    ) AS _human_gaps,
   133→
   134→    arrayFilter(

   146→    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '<command-name>/([^<]+)</command-name>'))) AS _slash_commands,

   192→      ),

   217→          AND _output_tokens < 500

   222→      50

   234→  FROM rudel.claude_sessions AS cs

   236→  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.session_id ORDER BY cs.ingested_at DESC) = 1`,

   238→
   239→export default schema(rudel_session_analytics, rudel_session_analytics_mv);

file.content:
import { materializedView, schema, table } from "@chkit/core";

const rudel_session_analytics = table({
	database: "rudel",
	name: "session_analytics",
	engine: "ReplacingMergeTree(ingested_at)",
	columns: [
		// ── Source columns from claude_sessions (SELECT *) ──────────────
		{
			name: "session_date",
			type: "DateTime64(3, 'UTC')",
			default: "fn:now64(3)",
		},
		{
			name: "last_interaction_date",
			type: "DateTime64(3, 'UTC')",
			default: "fn:now64(3)",
		},
		{ name: "session_id", type: "String" },
		{ name: "organization_id", type: "String" },
		{ name: "project_path", type: "String" },
		{ name: "repository", type: "String", nullable: true },
		{ name: "content", type: "String" },
		{ name: "subagents", type: "Map(String, String)", default: "fn:map()" },
		{ name: "skills", type: "Array(String)", default: "fn:[]" },
		{ name: "slash_commands", type: "Array(String)", default: "fn:[]" },
		{ name: "subagent_types", type: "Array(String)", default: "fn:[]" },
		{
			name: "ingested_at",
			type: "DateTime64(3, 'UTC')",
			default: "fn:now64(3)",
		},
		{ name: "user_id", type: "String" },
		{ name: "git_branch", type: "String", nullable: true },
		{ name: "git_sha", type: "String", nullable: true },
		{ name: "input_tokens", type: "UInt64", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "output_tokens", type: "UInt64", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "cache_read_input_tokens", type: "UInt64", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "cache_creation_input_tokens", type: "UInt64", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "total_tokens", type: "UInt64", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "tag", type: "String", nullable: true },

		// ── Computed metrics (populated by MV) ─────────────────────────
		{ name: "total_interactions", type: "UInt32", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "actual_duration_min", type: "UInt32", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "avg_period_sec", type: "Float64", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "median_period_sec", type: "Float64", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "quick_responses", type: "UInt32", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "normal_responses", type: "UInt32", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "long_pauses", type: "UInt32", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "error_count", type: "UInt32", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "model_used", type: "String", default: "''" },
		{ name: "has_commit", type: "UInt8", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "session_archetype", type: "String", default: "'standard'" },
		{ name: "success_score", type: "UInt8", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "used_plan_mode", type: "UInt8", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "inference_duration_sec", type: "UInt32", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "human_duration_sec", type: "UInt32", default: "fn:0" },
	],
	primaryKey: [],
	orderBy: ["organization_id", "session_date", "session_id"],
	partitionBy: "toYYYYMM(toDate(session_date))",
	settings: {
		index_granularity: "8192",
	},
	indexes: [
		{
			name: "idx_user_id",
			expression: "user_id",
			type: "set",
			granularity: 4,
		},
		{
			name: "idx_project_path",
			expression: "project_path",
			type: "set",
			granularity: 4,
		},
		{
			name: "idx_repository",
			expression: "repository",
			type: "set",
			granularity: 4,
		},
		{
			name: "idx_model_used",
			expression: "model_used",
			type: "set",
			granularity: 4,
		},
	],
});

const rudel_session_analytics_mv = materializedView({
	database: "rudel",
	name: "session_analytics_mv",
	to: { database: "rudel", name: "session_analytics" },
	as: `
  WITH
    arrayFilter(
      x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') IN ('user', 'assistant'),
      splitByChar('\\n', cs.content)
    ) AS _interaction_lines,

    arrayFilter(x -> JSONHas(x, 'timestamp'), _interaction_lines) AS _ts_lines,

    arrayMap(
      x -> parseDateTime64BestEffort(JSONExtractString(x, 'timestamp')),
      _ts_lines
    ) AS _timestamps,

    arrayMap(
      x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type'),
      _ts_lines
    ) AS _msg_types,

    if(length(_timestamps) > 1,
      arrayMap(i -> dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), range(1, length(_timestamps))),
      []
    ) AS _prompt_periods_sec,

    if(length(_timestamps) > 1,
      arrayMap(i -> if(_msg_types[i] = 'user' AND _msg_types[i+1] = 'assistant',
        dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), 0), range(1, length(_timestamps))),
      []
    ) AS _inference_gaps,

    if(length(_timestamps) > 1,
      arrayMap(i -> if(_msg_types[i] = 'assistant' AND _msg_types[i+1] = 'user',
        dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), 0), range(1, length(_timestamps))),
      []
    ) AS _human_gaps,

    arrayFilter(
      x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant' AND JSONHas(x, 'message'),
      splitByChar('\\n', cs.content)
    ) AS _assistant_lines,

    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _input_tokens,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'output_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _output_tokens,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_read_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_read,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_creation_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_creation,

    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '"name":"Skill"[^}]*"skill":"([^"]+)"'))) AS _skills,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '"name":"Task"[^}]*"subagent_type":"([^"]+)"'))) AS _subagent_types,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '<command-name>/([^<]+)</command-name>'))) AS _slash_commands,

    arrayMin(_timestamps) AS _session_date,
    arrayMax(_timestamps) AS _last_interaction_date,
    dateDiff('minute', _session_date, _last_interaction_date) AS _duration_min

  SELECT
    *,
    _session_date as session_date,
    _last_interaction_date as last_interaction_date,
    _input_tokens as input_tokens,
    _output_tokens as output_tokens,
    _cache_read as cache_read_input_tokens,
    _cache_creation as cache_creation_input_tokens,
    _input_tokens + _output_tokens as total_tokens,
    _skills as skills,
    _slash_commands as slash_commands,
    _subagent_types as subagent_types,
    toUInt32(length(_timestamps)) as total_interactions,
    toUInt32(_duration_min) as actual_duration_min,
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, round(arrayAvg(_prompt_periods_sec), 2), 0) as avg_period_sec,
    if(
      length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0,
      toFloat64(arrayElement(
        arraySort(_prompt_periods_sec),
        toUInt64(ceil(length(_prompt_periods_sec) / 2))
      )),
      0
    ) as median_period_sec,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x < 5, _prompt_periods_sec)) as quick_responses,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x >= 5 AND x <= 60, _prompt_periods_sec)) as normal_responses,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x > 300, _prompt_periods_sec)) as long_pauses,
    toUInt32(
      length(extractAll(cs.content, '"isApiErrorMessage":true'))
      + length(extractAll(cs.content, '"is_error":true'))
    ) as error_count,
    JSONExtractString(
      JSONExtractRaw(
        arrayElement(
          arrayFilter(
            x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant',
            splitByChar('\\n', cs.content)
          ),
          -1
        ),
        'message'
      ),
      'model'
    ) as model_used,
    toUInt8(if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 1, 0)) as has_commit,
    toUInt8(if(position(cs.content, '"name":"EnterPlanMode"') > 0, 1, 0)) as used_plan_mode,
    toUInt32(arraySum(_inference_gaps)) as inference_duration_sec,
    toUInt32(arraySum(_human_gaps)) as human_duration_sec,
    CASE
      WHEN _duration_min <= 10
          AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) < 500000
          AND _output_tokens > 1000
      THEN 'quick_win'
      WHEN _duration_min > 30
          AND _output_tokens > 50000
          AND cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != ''
      THEN 'deep_work'
      WHEN (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1000000
          AND (_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) < 0.3
          AND _duration_min > 20
      THEN 'struggle'
      WHEN length(_skills) >= 3
          AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = '')
          AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 200000
      THEN 'exploration'
      WHEN _duration_min < 3
          AND _output_tokens < 500
      THEN 'abandoned'
      ELSE 'standard'
    END as session_archetype,
    toUInt8(round(
      50
      + (if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 20, 0))
      + (if((_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) > 0.5, 15, 0))
      + (least(toUInt32(length(_skills)), 3) * 5)
      - (if((_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1500000 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = ''), 20, 0))
      - (if(_duration_min < 2 AND _output_tokens < 200, 30, 0))
      - (least(toUInt32(
          length(extractAll(cs.content, '"isApiErrorMessage":true'))
          + length(extractAll(cs.content, '"is_error":true'))
        ), 10) * 2)
    )) as success_score

  FROM rudel.claude_sessions AS cs
  WHERE length(_timestamps) > 0
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.session_id ORDER BY cs.ingested_at DESC) = 1`,
});

export default schema(rudel_session_analytics, rudel_session_analytics_mv);

content.thinking:
I see the issue. The MV does `SELECT *` from `rudel.claude_sessions AS cs`, and then also explicitly aliases `_session_date as session_date`. But `claude_sessions` already has a `session_date` column. So `SELECT *` already includes `session_date`, and then the explicit `_session_date as session_date` creates a duplicate.

But the error message says `cs.session_date` - it seems ClickHouse is outputting `SELECT *` columns prefixed with the table alias `cs.`. 

Wait, actually, the CLAUDE.md mentions: "WITH expr AS alias columns are NOT included in SELECT *." So `_session_date` from the WITH clause is not in `SELECT *`. The issue is that `SELECT *` expands `claude_sessions` columns including `session_date`, and those columns come out as `cs.session_date`, `cs.last_interaction_date`, etc. because of the table alias.
 
So the duplicate `session_date` is causing ClickHouse to prefix the one from `SELECT *` with the table alias to disambiguate, which then fails when trying to insert into the target table.

The solution is straightforward: since `claude_sessions` now has these columns natively, I should remove the explicit aliased selections from the MV's SELECT statement and let `SELECT *` handle them.

But there's a catch—the `session_date` column in `claude_sessions` is computed from `now64(3)` at insertion time, whereas the MV's `_session_date` is derived from actual message timestamps, which are what we actually need. So I need to check what that recent infrastructure change was actually trying to accomplish and whether it changed how `session_date` is being calculated. these timestamp columns with computed values from the materialized view, creating the duplicate column problem. The real issue is that `claude_sessions` now stores these timestamps as actual columns (with defaults), but the MV is trying to compute and override them from the message content, which creates a conflict in the `SELECT *`.

The solution is to exclude those columns from the source table using `SELECT * EXCEPT (session_date, last_interaction_date)` and then provide the computed versions instead. ClickHouse supports this syntax, so I'll update the MV definition to exclude the problematic columns and regenerate the migration.

content.text:
The issue is clear: `claude_sessions` now has `session_date` and `last_interaction_date` as actual columns. The MV's `SELECT *` includes them, but the MV also explicitly aliases `_session_date as session_date`, creating duplicates — ClickHouse disambiguates with the `cs.` prefix which doesn't match the target table.

Fix: use `SELECT * EXCEPT (session_date, last_interaction_date)` so the computed values replace the source ones.

input.new_string:
SELECT

toolUseResult.originalFile:
import { materializedView, schema, table } from "@chkit/core";

const rudel_session_analytics = table({
	database: "rudel",
	name: "session_analytics",
	engine: "ReplacingMergeTree(ingested_at)",
	columns: [
		// ── Source columns from claude_sessions (SELECT *) ──────────────
		{
			name: "session_date",
			type: "DateTime64(3, 'UTC')",
			default: "fn:now64(3)",
		},
		{
			name: "last_interaction_date",
			type: "DateTime64(3, 'UTC')",
			default: "fn:now64(3)",
		},
		{ name: "session_id", type: "String" },
		{ name: "organization_id", type: "String" },
		{ name: "project_path", type: "String" },
		{ name: "repository", type: "String", nullable: true },
		{ name: "content", type: "String" },
		{ name: "subagents", type: "Map(String, String)", default: "fn:map()" },
		{ name: "skills", type: "Array(String)", default: "fn:[]" },
		{ name: "slash_commands", type: "Array(String)", default: "fn:[]" },
		{ name: "subagent_types", type: "Array(String)", default: "fn:[]" },
		{
			name: "ingested_at",
			type: "DateTime64(3, 'UTC')",
			default: "fn:now64(3)",
		},
		{ name: "user_id", type: "String" },
		{ name: "git_branch", type: "String", nullable: true },
		{ name: "git_sha", type: "String", nullable: true },
		{ name: "input_tokens", type: "UInt64", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "output_tokens", type: "UInt64", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "cache_read_input_tokens", type: "UInt64", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "cache_creation_input_tokens", type: "UInt64", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "total_tokens", type: "UInt64", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "tag", type: "String", nullable: true },

		// ── Computed metrics (populated by MV) ─────────────────────────
		{ name: "total_interactions", type: "UInt32", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "actual_duration_min", type: "UInt32", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "avg_period_sec", type: "Float64", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "median_period_sec", type: "Float64", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "quick_responses", type: "UInt32", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "normal_responses", type: "UInt32", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "long_pauses", type: "UInt32", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "error_count", type: "UInt32", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "model_used", type: "String", default: "''" },
		{ name: "has_commit", type: "UInt8", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "session_archetype", type: "String", default: "'standard'" },
		{ name: "success_score", type: "UInt8", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "used_plan_mode", type: "UInt8", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "inference_duration_sec", type: "UInt32", default: "fn:0" },
		{ name: "human_duration_sec", type: "UInt32", default: "fn:0" },
	],
	primaryKey: [],
	orderBy: ["organization_id", "session_date", "session_id"],
	partitionBy: "toYYYYMM(toDate(session_date))",
	settings: {
		index_granularity: "8192",
	},
	indexes: [
		{
			name: "idx_user_id",
			expression: "user_id",
			type: "set",
			granularity: 4,
		},
		{
			name: "idx_project_path",
			expression: "project_path",
			type: "set",
			granularity: 4,
		},
		{
			name: "idx_repository",
			expression: "repository",
			type: "set",
			granularity: 4,
		},
		{
			name: "idx_model_used",
			expression: "model_used",
			type: "set",
			granularity: 4,
		},
	],
});

const rudel_session_analytics_mv = materializedView({
	database: "rudel",
	name: "session_analytics_mv",
	to: { database: "rudel", name: "session_analytics" },
	as: `
  WITH
    arrayFilter(
      x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') IN ('user', 'assistant'),
      splitByChar('\\n', cs.content)
    ) AS _interaction_lines,

    arrayFilter(x -> JSONHas(x, 'timestamp'), _interaction_lines) AS _ts_lines,

    arrayMap(
      x -> parseDateTime64BestEffort(JSONExtractString(x, 'timestamp')),
      _ts_lines
    ) AS _timestamps,

    arrayMap(
      x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type'),
      _ts_lines
    ) AS _msg_types,

    if(length(_timestamps) > 1,
      arrayMap(i -> dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), range(1, length(_timestamps))),
      []
    ) AS _prompt_periods_sec,

    if(length(_timestamps) > 1,
      arrayMap(i -> if(_msg_types[i] = 'user' AND _msg_types[i+1] = 'assistant',
        dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), 0), range(1, length(_timestamps))),
      []
    ) AS _inference_gaps,

    if(length(_timestamps) > 1,
      arrayMap(i -> if(_msg_types[i] = 'assistant' AND _msg_types[i+1] = 'user',
        dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), 0), range(1, length(_timestamps))),
      []
    ) AS _human_gaps,

    arrayFilter(
      x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant' AND JSONHas(x, 'message'),
      splitByChar('\\n', cs.content)
    ) AS _assistant_lines,

    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _input_tokens,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'output_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _output_tokens,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_read_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_read,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_creation_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_creation,

    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '"name":"Skill"[^}]*"skill":"([^"]+)"'))) AS _skills,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '"name":"Task"[^}]*"subagent_type":"([^"]+)"'))) AS _subagent_types,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '<command-name>/([^<]+)</command-name>'))) AS _slash_commands,

    arrayMin(_timestamps) AS _session_date,
    arrayMax(_timestamps) AS _last_interaction_date,
    dateDiff('minute', _session_date, _last_interaction_date) AS _duration_min

  SELECT
    *,
    _session_date as session_date,
    _last_interaction_date as last_interaction_date,
    _input_tokens as input_tokens,
    _output_tokens as output_tokens,
    _cache_read as cache_read_input_tokens,
    _cache_creation as cache_creation_input_tokens,
    _input_tokens + _output_tokens as total_tokens,
    _skills as skills,
    _slash_commands as slash_commands,
    _subagent_types as subagent_types,
    toUInt32(length(_timestamps)) as total_interactions,
    toUInt32(_duration_min) as actual_duration_min,
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, round(arrayAvg(_prompt_periods_sec), 2), 0) as avg_period_sec,
    if(
      length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0,
      toFloat64(arrayElement(
        arraySort(_prompt_periods_sec),
        toUInt64(ceil(length(_prompt_periods_sec) / 2))
      )),
      0
    ) as median_period_sec,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x < 5, _prompt_periods_sec)) as quick_responses,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x >= 5 AND x <= 60, _prompt_periods_sec)) as normal_responses,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x > 300, _prompt_periods_sec)) as long_pauses,
    toUInt32(
      length(extractAll(cs.content, '"isApiErrorMessage":true'))
      + length(extractAll(cs.content, '"is_error":true'))
    ) as error_count,
    JSONExtractString(
      JSONExtractRaw(
        arrayElement(
          arrayFilter(
            x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant',
            splitByChar('\\n', cs.content)
          ),
          -1
        ),
        'message'
      ),
      'model'
    ) as model_used,
    toUInt8(if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 1, 0)) as has_commit,
    toUInt8(if(position(cs.content, '"name":"EnterPlanMode"') > 0, 1, 0)) as used_plan_mode,
    toUInt32(arraySum(_inference_gaps)) as inference_duration_sec,
    toUInt32(arraySum(_human_gaps)) as human_duration_sec,
    CASE
      WHEN _duration_min <= 10
          AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) < 500000
          AND _output_tokens > 1000
      THEN 'quick_win'
      WHEN _duration_min > 30
          AND _output_tokens > 50000
          AND cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != ''
      THEN 'deep_work'
      WHEN (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1000000
          AND (_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) < 0.3
          AND _duration_min > 20
      THEN 'struggle'
      WHEN length(_skills) >= 3
          AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = '')
          AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 200000
      THEN 'exploration'
      WHEN _duration_min < 3
          AND _output_tokens < 500
      THEN 'abandoned'
      ELSE 'standard'
    END as session_archetype,
    toUInt8(round(
      50
      + (if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 20, 0))
      + (if((_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) > 0.5, 15, 0))
      + (least(toUInt32(length(_skills)), 3) * 5)
      - (if((_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1500000 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = ''), 20, 0))
      - (if(_duration_min < 2 AND _output_tokens < 200, 30, 0))
      - (least(toUInt32(
          length(extractAll(cs.content, '"isApiErrorMessage":true'))
          + length(extractAll(cs.content, '"is_error":true'))
        ), 10) * 2)
    )) as success_score

  FROM rudel.claude_sessions AS cs
  WHERE length(_timestamps) > 0
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.session_id ORDER BY cs.ingested_at DESC) = 1`,
});

export default schema(rudel_session_analytics, rudel_session_analytics_mv);

subagent_types, toUInt32(length(_timestamps)) as total_interactions, toUInt32(_duration_min) as actual_duration_min, if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, round(arrayAvg(_prompt_periods_sec), 2), 0) as avg_period_sec, if( length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, toFloat64(arrayElement( arraySort(_prompt_periods_sec), toUInt64(ceil(length(_prompt_periods_sec) / 2)) )), 0 ) as median_period_sec, toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x < 5, _prompt_periods_sec)) as quick_responses, toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x >= 5 AND x <= 60, _prompt_periods_sec)) as normal_responses, toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x > 300, _prompt_periods_sec)) as long_pauses, toUInt32( length(extractAll(cs.content, '"isApiErrorMessage":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '"is_error":true')) ) as error_count, JSONExtractString( JSONExtractRaw( arrayElement( arrayFilter( x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant', splitByChar('\n', cs.content) ), -1 ), 'message' ), 'model' ) as model_used, toUInt8(if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 1, 0)) as has_commit, toUInt8(if(position(cs.content, '"name":"EnterPlanMode"') > 0, 1, 0)) as used_plan_mode, toUInt32(arraySum(_inference_gaps)) as inference_duration_sec, toUInt32(arraySum(_human_gaps)) as human_duration_sec, CASE WHEN _duration_min <= 10 AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) < 500000 AND _output_tokens > 1000 THEN 'quick_win' WHEN _duration_min > 30 AND _output_tokens > 50000 AND cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '' THEN 'deep_work' WHEN (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1000000 AND (_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) < 0.3 AND _duration_min > 20 THEN 'struggle' WHEN length(_skills) >= 3 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = '') AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 200000 THEN 'exploration' WHEN _duration_min < 3 AND _output_tokens < 500 THEN 'abandoned' ELSE 'standard' END as session_archetype, toUInt8(round( 50 + (if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 20, 0)) + (if((_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) > 0.5, 15, 0)) + (least(toUInt32(length(_skills)), 3) * 5) - (if((_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1500000 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = ''), 20, 0)) - (if(_duration_min < 2 AND _output_tokens < 200, 30, 0)) - (least(toUInt32( length(extractAll(cs.content, '"isApiErrorMessage":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '"is_error":true')) ), 10) * 2) )) as success_score FROM rudel.claude_sessions AS cs WHERE length(_timestamps) > 0 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.session_id ORDER BY cs.ingested_at DESC) = 1;

content.text:
Both backfills running in background. While they run, here's a summary of what was done and what I fixed:

**Completed:**
1. Migrations applied on CI + PRD
2. `session_analytics` truncated on both
3. Backfills started on both (running in background)

**Bug fix:** The original migration failed because `claude_sessions` now has `session_date` and `last_interaction_date` as actual columns. The MV's `SELECT *` included them, but the MV also computed them from timestamps with explicit aliases — creating duplicate column names. Fixed by changing `SELECT *` to `SELECT * EXCEPT (session_date, last_interaction_date)` in the MV definition.

I'll let you know when the backfills finish.

The backfill uses `session_date` for windowing, filtering on specific time ranges. If the existing data has `session_date` values set to the ingestion time rather than the actual event timestamp, the WHERE clause filters would miss all the records.

Actually, I'm realizing the column likely existed before—the recent change was about moving the timestamp extraction logic from the API to a materialized view, not adding the column itself.

I see `"replayDone": false` and `"replayFailed": false`. These backfill plans were already "run" once, and all chunks are marked as "done". The deduplication tokens would prevent reinsertion on the second run.

But also, I notice that these plans were generated with the OLD MV query (before the `EXCEPT` fix). The plans' SQL uses explicit column lists (not `SELECT *`), so they shouldn't have the column name issue.

The real issue might be that these plans were already "completed" from a previous run. Since the backfill plugin checks if a plan is already done, it might have just immediately returned "completed (done=1700/1700)" without actually running any SQL.


I need to generate fresh backfill plans to replace the exhausted ones.

      "sqlTemplate": "/* chkit backfill plan=059f453e8152a512 chunk=75df3525a5bae03b token=REDACTED */\nINSERT INTO rudel.session_analytics\nSELECT *\nFROM rudel.session_analytics\nWHERE session_

content.thinking:
There it is! The new plan's SQL is:
```sql
INSERT INTO rudel.session_analytics
SELECT *
FROM rudel.session_analytics
WHERE session_date >= toDateTime('2025-01-01T00:00:00.000Z')
  AND session_date < toDateTime('2025-01-01T06:00:00.000Z');
```

This is `INSERT INTO table_x SELECT * FROM table_x` — reading and writing from the SAME table! That's the known issue from CLAUDE.md:

> **ClickHouse Cloud silent INSERT behavior.** `INSERT INTO table_x SELECT ... FROM table_x` (same source and target table) silently writes 0 rows even with `async_insert=0` — you must read from a different source table.


The backfill plugin is generating the wrong strategy here. The MV replay approach should be reading from `claude_sessions` (the source table), not doing a self-copy of `session_analytics`. The old plans had the full MV query inlined with `"strategy": "mv_replay"`, but this new plan is just a straight table copy instead.

Since I can't easily adjust the plugin's behavior, I'll manually construct an INSERT statement using the MV's query definition directly to backfill the data properly.

content.text:
Found the problem. The new plan generates `INSERT INTO rudel.session_analytics SELECT * FROM rudel.session_analytics` — a self-copy! This is the known issue from CLAUDE.md: same source and target table silently writes 0 rows.

The old plans (from your original backfill) used `mv_replay` strategy with the MV query reading from `claude_sessions`. The new plans lost that strategy.

Let me do a manual backfill using the MV query directly. I'll test on CI first:

input.command:
bun run --cwd packages/ch-schema chcli -- -q "
INSERT INTO rudel.session_analytics
WITH
    arrayFilter(x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') IN ('user', 'assistant'), splitByChar('\n', cs.content)) AS _interaction_lines,
    arrayFilter(x -> JSONHas(x, 'timestamp'), _interaction_lines) AS _ts_lines,
    arrayMap(x -> parseDateTime64BestEffort(JSONExtractString(x, 'timestamp')), _ts_lines) AS _timestamps,
    arrayMap(x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type'), _ts_lines) AS _msg_types,
    if(length(_timestamps) > 1, arrayMap(i -> dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), range(1, length(_timestamps))), []) AS _prompt_periods_sec,
    if(length(_timestamps) > 1, arrayMap(i -> if(_msg_types[i] = 'user' AND _msg_types[i+1] = 'assistant', dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), 0), range(1, length(_timestamps))), []) AS _inference_gaps,
    if(length(_timestamps) > 1, arrayMap(i -> if(_msg_types[i] = 'assistant' AND _msg_types[i+1] = 'user', dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), 0), range(1, length(_timestamps))), []) AS _human_gaps,
    arrayFilter(x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant' AND JSONHas(x, 'message'), splitByChar('\n', cs.content)) AS _assistant_lines,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _input_tokens,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'output_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _output_tokens,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_read_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_read,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_creation_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_creation,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '\"name\":\"Skill\"[^}]*\"skill\":\"([^\"]+)\"'))) AS _skills,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '\"name\":\"Task\"[^}]*\"subagent_type\":\"([^\"]+)\"'))) AS _subagent_types,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '<command-name>/([^<]+)</command-name>'))) AS _slash_commands,
    arrayMin(_timestamps) AS _session_date,
    arrayMax(_timestamps) AS _last_interaction_date,
    dateDiff('minute', _session_date, _last_interaction_date) AS _duration_min
SELECT
    * EXCEPT (session_date, last_interaction_date),
    _session_date as session_date,
    _last_interaction_date as last_interaction_date,
    _input_tokens as input_tokens,
    _output_tokens as output_tokens,
    _cache_read as cache_read_input_tokens,
    _cache_creation as cache_creation_input_tokens,
    _input_tokens + _output_tokens as total_tokens,
    _skills as skills,
    _slash_commands as slash_commands,
    _subagent_types as subagent_types,
    toUInt32(length(_timestamps)) as total_interactions,
    toUInt32(_duration_min) as actual_duration_min,
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, round(arrayAvg(_prompt_periods_sec), 2), 0) as avg_period_sec,
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, toFloat64(arrayElement(arraySort(_prompt_periods_sec), toUInt64(ceil(length(_prompt_periods_sec) / 2)))), 0) as median_period_sec,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x < 5, _prompt_periods_sec)) as quick_responses,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x >= 5 AND x <= 60, _prompt_periods_sec)) as normal_responses,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x > 300, _prompt_periods_sec)) as long_pauses,
    toUInt32(length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"isApiErrorMessage\":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"is_error\":true'))) as error_count,
    JSONExtractString(JSONExtractRaw(arrayElement(arrayFilter(x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant', splitByChar('\n', cs.content)), -1), 'message'), 'model') as model_used,
    toUInt8(if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 1, 0)) as has_commit,
    toUInt8(if(position(cs.content, '\"name\":\"EnterPlanMode\"') > 0, 1, 0)) as used_plan_mode,
    toUInt32(arraySum(_inference_gaps)) as inference_duration_sec,
    toUInt32(arraySum(_human_gaps)) as human_duration_sec,
    CASE
      WHEN _duration_min <= 10 AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) < 500000 AND _output_tokens > 1000 THEN 'quick_win'
      WHEN _duration_min > 30 AND _output_tokens > 50000 AND cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '' THEN 'deep_work'
      WHEN (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1000000 AND (_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) < 0.3 AND _duration_min > 20 THEN 'struggle'
      WHEN length(_skills) >= 3 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = '') AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 200000 THEN 'exploration'
      WHEN _duration_min < 3 AND _output_tokens < 500 THEN 'abandoned'
      ELSE 'standard'
    END as session_archetype,
    toUInt8(round(
      50
      + (if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 20, 0))
      + (if((_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) > 0.5, 15, 0))
      + (least(toUInt32(length(_skills)), 3) * 5)
      - (if((_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1500000 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = ''), 20, 0))
      - (if(_duration_min < 2 AND _output_tokens < 200, 30, 0))
      - (least(toUInt32(length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"isApiErrorMessage\":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"is_error\":true'))), 10) * 2)
    )) as success_score
FROM rudel.claude_sessions AS cs
WHERE length(_timestamps) > 0
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.session_id ORDER BY cs.ingested_at DESC) = 1
SETTINGS async_insert=0
" 2>&1

    arrayFilter(x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant' AND JSONHas(x, 'message'), splitByChar('\\n', cs.content)) AS _assistant_lines,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _input_tokens,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'output_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _output_tokens,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_read_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_read,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_creation_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_creation,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '\"name\":\"Skill\"[^}]*\"skill\":\"([^\"]+)\"'))) AS _skills,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '\"name\":\"Task\"[^}]*\"subagent_type\":\"([^\"]+)\"'))) AS _subagent_types,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '<command-name>/([^<]+)</command-name>'))) AS _slash_commands,
    arrayMin(_timestamps) AS _session_date,
    arrayMax(_timestamps) AS _last_interaction_date,
    dateDiff('minute', _session_date, _last_interaction_date) AS _duration_min
SELECT
    * EXCEPT (session_date, last_interaction_date),
    _session_date as session_date,
    _last_interaction_date as last_interaction_date,
    _input_tokens as input_tokens,
    _output_tokens as output_tokens,
    _cache_read as cache_read_input_tokens,
    _cache_creation as cache_creation_input_tokens,
    _input_tokens + _output_tokens as total_tokens,
    _skills as skills,
    _slash_commands as slash_commands,
    _subagent_types as subagent_types,
    toUInt32(length(_timestamps)) as total_interactions,
    toUInt32(_duration_min) as actual_duration_min,
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, round(arrayAvg(_prompt_periods_sec), 2), 0) as avg_period_sec,
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, toFloat64(arrayElement(arraySort(_prompt_periods_sec), toUInt64(ceil(length(_prompt_periods_sec) / 2)))), 0) as median_period_sec,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x < 5, _prompt_periods_sec)) as quick_responses,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x >= 5 AND x <= 60, _prompt_periods_sec)) as normal_responses,
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x > 300, _prompt_periods_sec)) as long_pauses,
    toUInt32(length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"isApiErrorMessage\":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"is_error\":true'))) as error_count,
    JSONExtractString(JSONExtractRaw(arrayElement(arrayFilter(x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant', splitByChar('\\n', cs.content)), -1), 'message'), 'model') as model_used,
    toUInt8(if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 1, 0)) as has_commit,
    toUInt8(if(position(cs.content, '\"name\":\"EnterPlanMode\"') > 0, 1, 0)) as used_plan_mode,
    toUInt32(arraySum(_inference_gaps)) as inference_duration_sec,
    toUInt32(arraySum(_human_gaps)) as human_duration_sec,
    CASE
      WHEN _duration_min <= 10 AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) < 500000 AND _output_tokens > 1000 THEN 'quick_win'
      WHEN _duration_min > 30 AND _output_tokens > 50000 AND cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '' THEN 'deep_work'
      WHEN (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1000000 AND (_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) < 0.3 AND _duration_min > 20 THEN 'struggle'
      WHEN length(_skills) >= 3 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = '') AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 200000 THEN 'exploration'
      WHEN _duration_min < 3 AND _output_tokens < 500 THEN 'abandoned'
      ELSE 'standard'
    END as session_archetype,
    toUInt8(round(
      50
      + (if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 20, 0))
      + (if((_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) > 0.5, 15, 0))
      + (least(toUInt32(length(_skills)), 3) * 5)
      - (if((_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1500000 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = ''), 20, 0))
      - (if(_duration_min < 2 AND _output_tokens < 200, 30, 0))
      - (least(toUInt32(length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"isApiErrorMessage\":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"is_error\":true'))), 10) * 2)
    )) as success_score
FROM rudel.claude_sessions AS cs
WHERE length(_timestamps) > 0
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.session_id ORDER BY cs.ingested_at DESC) = 1
SETTINGS async_insert=0

When using `SELECT * EXCEPT (session_date, last_interaction_date)` from `claude_sessions`, the `*` expands all columns. The source table doesn't have these columns at all, so the `EXCEPT` clause might be creating a type mismatch when trying to insert into these fields.

Actually, I think the real problem is with how ClickHouse handles column matching during the INSERT. When using `SELECT * EXCEPT`, the columns from `claude_sessions` get matched by position to the target table, and somewhere in that process ClickHouse is trying to wrap an `Array(String)` in `Nullable`, which isn't allowed. Let me verify the exact column count and order to see where the mismatch occurs. I'm continuing through the remaining computed columns and then need to map everything to the target table's column order, starting with the date fields followed by session identifiers and attributes. I see the column order mismatch — my SELECT is pulling columns in a different sequence than the INSERT target expects, which means ClickHouse will match them by position and cause type errors. content.thinking:
254 rows in one week and 146 in another. The memory issue is probably because the `content` column is very large (full session transcripts). Let me try splitting into even smaller chunks — maybe 50 rows at a time using LIMIT/OFFSET, or by day.

Actually, let me try by day.

content.text: 400 rows in February, mostly in two weeks. The content column is huge (full transcripts). Let me batch by day:

input.command:
for d in $(seq 13 28); do
  day=$(printf "2026-02-%02d" $d)
  next=$(printf "2026-02-%02d" $((d+1)))
  if [ $d -eq 28 ]; then next="2026-03-01"; fi
  echo "Processing $day..."
  bun run --cwd packages/ch-schema chcli:prd -- -q "
  INSERT INTO rudel.session_analytics (
    session_date, last_interaction_date, session_id, organization_id, project_path, repository, content, subagents, skills, slash_commands, subagent_types, ingested_at, user_id, git_branch, git_sha, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_read_input_tokens, cache_creation_input_tokens, total_tokens, tag, total_interactions, actual_duration_min, avg_period_sec, median_period_sec, quick_responses, normal_responses, long_pauses, error_count, model_used, has_commit, session_archetype, success_score, used_plan_mode, inference_duration_sec, human_duration_sec
  )
  WITH
    arrayFilter(x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') IN ('user', 'assistant'), splitByChar('\n', cs.content)) AS _interaction_lines,
    arrayFilter(x -> JSONHas(x, 'timestamp'), _interaction_lines) AS _ts_lines,
    arrayMap(x -> parseDateTime64BestEffort(JSONExtractString(x, 'timestamp')), _ts_lines) AS _timestamps,
    arrayMap(x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type'), _ts_lines) AS _msg_types,
    if(length(_timestamps) > 1, arrayMap(i -> dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), range(1, length(_timestamps))), []) AS _prompt_periods_sec,
    if(length(_timestamps) > 1, arrayMap(i -> if(_msg_types[i] = 'user' AND _msg_types[i+1] = 'assistant', dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), 0), range(1, length(_timestamps))), []) AS _inference_gaps,
    if(length(_timestamps) > 1, arrayMap(i -> if(_msg_types[i] = 'assistant' AND _msg_types[i+1] = 'user', dateDiff('second', _timestamps[i], _timestamps[i+1]), 0), range(1, length(_timestamps))), []) AS _human_gaps,
    arrayFilter(x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant' AND JSONHas(x, 'message'), splitByChar('\n', cs.content)) AS _assistant_lines,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _input_tokens,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'output_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _output_tokens,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_read_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_read,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_creation_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_creation,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '\"name\":\"Skill\"[^}]*\"skill\":\"([^\"]+)\"'))) AS _skills,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '\"name\":\"Task\"[^}]*\"subagent_type\":\"([^\"]+)\"'))) AS _subagent_types,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '<command-name>/([^<]+)</command-name>'))) AS _slash_commands,
    arrayMin(_timestamps) AS _session_date,
    arrayMax(_timestamps) AS _last_interaction_date,
    dateDiff('minute', _session_date, _last_interaction_date) AS _duration_min
  SELECT
    _session_date, _last_interaction_date, cs.session_id, cs.organization_id, cs.project_path, cs.repository, cs.content, cs.subagents,
    _skills, _slash_commands, _subagent_types, cs.ingested_at, cs.user_id, cs.git_branch, cs.git_sha,
    _input_tokens, _output_tokens, _cache_read, _cache_creation, _input_tokens + _output_tokens,
    cs.tag,
    toUInt32(length(_timestamps)),
    toUInt32(_duration_min),
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, round(arrayAvg(_prompt_periods_sec), 2), 0),
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, toFloat64(arrayElement(arraySort(_prompt_periods_sec), toUInt64(ceil(length(_prompt_periods_sec) / 2)))), 0),
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x < 5, _prompt_periods_sec)),
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x >= 5 AND x <= 60, _prompt_periods_sec)),
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x > 300, _prompt_periods_sec)),
    toUInt32(length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"isApiErrorMessage\":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"is_error\":true'))),
    JSONExtractString(JSONExtractRaw(arrayElement(arrayFilter(x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant', splitByChar('\n', cs.content)), -1), 'message'), 'model'),
    toUInt8(if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 1, 0)),
    CASE
      WHEN _duration_min <= 10 AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) < 500000 AND _output_tokens > 1000 THEN 'quick_win'
      WHEN _duration_min > 30 AND _output_tokens > 50000 AND cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '' THEN 'deep_work'
      WHEN (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1000000 AND (_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) < 0.3 AND _duration_min > 20 THEN 'struggle'
      WHEN length(_skills) >= 3 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = '') AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 200000 THEN 'exploration'
      WHEN _duration_min < 3 AND _output_tokens < 500 THEN 'abandoned'
      ELSE 'standard'
    END,
    toUInt8(round(50 + (if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 20, 0)) + (if((_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) > 0.5, 15, 0)) + (least(toUInt32(length(_skills)), 3) * 5) - (if((_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1500000 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = ''), 20, 0)) - (if(_duration_min < 2 AND _output_tokens < 200, 30, 0)) - (least(toUInt32(length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"isApiErrorMessage\":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"is_error\":true'))), 10) * 2))),
    toUInt8(if(position(cs.content, '\"name\":\"EnterPlanMode\"') > 0, 1, 0)),
    toUInt32(arraySum(_inference_gaps)),
    toUInt32(arraySum(_human_gaps))
  FROM rudel.claude_sessions AS cs
  WHERE length(_timestamps) > 0
    AND session_date >= '$day'
    AND session_date < '$next'
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.session_id ORDER BY cs.ingested_at DESC) = 1
  SETTINGS async_insert=0
  " 2>&1
  if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "FAILED on $day"; break; fi
done

    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _input_tokens,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'output_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _output_tokens,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_read_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_read,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_creation_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_creation,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '\"name\":\"Skill\"[^}]*\"skill\":\"([^\"]+)\"'))) AS _skills,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '\"name\":\"Task\"[^}]*\"subagent_type\":\"([^\"]+)\"'))) AS _subagent_types,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '<command-name>/([^<]+)</command-name>'))) AS _slash_commands,
    arrayMin(_timestamps) AS _session_date,
    arrayMax(_timestamps) AS _last_interaction_date,
    dateDiff('minute', _session_date, _last_interaction_date) AS _duration_min
SELECT
    _session_date, _last_interaction_date, cs.session_id, cs.organization_id, cs.project_path, cs.repository, cs.content, cs.subagents,
    _skills, _slash_commands, _subagent_types, cs.ingested_at, cs.user_id, cs.git_branch, cs.git_sha,
    _input_tokens, _output_tokens, _cache_read, _cache_creation, _input_tokens + _output_tokens,
    cs.tag,
    toUInt32(length(_timestamps)),
    toUInt32(_duration_min),
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, round(arrayAvg(_prompt_periods_sec), 2), 0),
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, toFloat64(arrayElement(arraySort(_prompt_periods_sec), toUInt64(ceil(length(_prompt_periods_sec) / 2)))), 0),
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x < 5, _prompt_periods_sec)),
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x >= 5 AND x <= 60, _prompt_periods_sec)),
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x > 300, _prompt_periods_sec)),
    toUInt32(length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"isApiErrorMessage\":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"is_error\":true'))),
    JSONExtractString(JSONExtractRaw(arrayElement(arrayFilter(x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant', splitByChar('\n', cs.content)), -1), 'message'), 'model'),
    toUInt8(if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 1, 0)),
    CASE
      WHEN _duration_min <= 10 AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) < 500000 AND _output_tokens > 1000 THEN 'quick_win'
      WHEN _duration_min > 30 AND _output_tokens > 50000 AND cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '' THEN 'deep_work'
      WHEN (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1000000 AND (_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) < 0.3 AND _duration_min > 20 THEN 'struggle'
      WHEN length(_skills) >= 3 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = '') AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 200000 THEN 'exploration'
      WHEN _duration_min < 3 AND _output_tokens < 500 THEN 'abandoned'
      ELSE 'standard'
    END,
    toUInt8(round(50 + (if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 20, 0)) + (if((_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) > 0.5, 15, 0)) + (least(toUInt32(length(_skills)), 3) * 5) - (if((_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1500000 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = ''), 20, 0)) - (if(_duration_min < 2 AND _output_tokens < 200, 30, 0)) - (least(toUInt32(length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"isApiErrorMessage\":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"is_error\":true'))), 10) * 2))),
    toUInt8(if(position(cs.content, '\"name\":\"EnterPlanMode\"') > 0, 1, 0)),
    toUInt32(arraySum(_inference_gaps)),
    toUInt32(arraySum(_human_gaps))
FROM rudel.claude_sessions AS cs
WHERE length(_timestamps) > 0
  AND session_date >= '2026-01-01'
  AND session_date < '2026-02-01'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.session_id ORDER BY cs.ingested_at DESC) = 1
SETTINGS async_insert=0
" 2>&1

content.thinking:
The analytics counts are lower than source counts:
- CI: 136 analytics / 408 source (33%)- PRD: 148 analytics / 401 source (37%)

This is expected because:
1. The MV filters `WHERE length(_timestamps) > 0` — sessions without parseable timestamps are excluded2. The `QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.session_id ORDER BY cs.ingested_at DESC) = 1` deduplicates by session_id, keeping only the latest version
3. `ReplacingMergeTree` may deduplicate further

Let me verify the dedup is the main factor:

content.thinking:
The user is asking about the backfill plans. Let me address their concerns:

1. The original plans (e1d62173d06b9323 and 3eea159c576b48c8) were created before the merge
2. When I ran them, they completed "successfully" but wrote 0 rows because they were already marked as "done" from a previous run
3. I then created new plans (059f453e8152a512) which also wrote 0 rows because the plugin generated self-copy SQL instead of MV replay SQL
4. I ended up doing a manual INSERT which worked

So the user is right - we shouldn't have needed new plans. 

The original plans should have worked, but they were already consumed, and the new ones had a different bug with the SQL generation. There's also a pre-existing type error in the codegen where the `RudelClaudeSessionsRow` interface doesn't have an index signature, making it incompatible with `Record<string, unknown>`. Let me answer the user's question first before cleaning up the extra plan files.

Looking at the verify failure, it seems the `@rudel/ch-schema:check-types` was already broken before my changes since it showed a cache miss. I should check if the snapshot actually changed the types, then address the user and do some cleanup.

content.text:
Good question — let me explain what happened and clean up.

**What went wrong with the original plans:**

The original plans (`e1d62173d06b9323` CI, `3eea159c576b48c8` PRD) used `mv_replay` strategy and had the correct MV query. But when I ran them, they were already marked as "completed" (all 1700 chunks "done") from a previous run. The backfill plugin just returned "completed (done=1700/1700)" instantly without executing any SQL.

**Why new plans were created:**

I regenerated plans hoping for fresh dedup tokens. But the new plan (`059f453e8152a512`) had a different bug — the plugin generated `INSERT INTO session_analytics SELECT * FROM session_analytics` (self-copy from the same table), which silently writes 0 rows on ClickHouse Cloud.

**What actually worked:**

I ended up doing a manual `INSERT INTO ... SELECT ... FROM claude_sessions` with the MV query directly — bypassing the backfill plugin entirely.

Let me clean up the extra plan/run files:

content.text:
All 11 tasks pass, all tests green. Here's the complete summary:

**What was done:**

| Step | CI | PRD |
|------|-----|-----|
| Migration applied | `session_analytics_mv` recreated with `EXCEPT` | Same |
| Truncate `session_analytics` | Done | Done |
| Backfill | 136 rows | 148 rows |
| Verify | All passing | — |

**Issues fixed along the way:**
1. **MV `SELECT *` conflict** — `claude_sessions` now has `session_date`/`last_interaction_date` columns, causing duplicates with the MV's computed aliases. Fixed with `SELECT * EXCEPT (session_date, last_interaction_date)`.
2. **Backfill plugin generated self-copy SQL** — new plans used `INSERT INTO session_analytics SELECT * FROM session_analytics` instead of MV replay. Worked around by running the INSERT manually.
3. **PRD memory limit** — full backfill OOM'd at 3.2 GiB. Batched by day.
4. **Codegen lost type casts** — `ch:generate` regenerated `chkit-ingest.ts` without the `as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[]` workaround. Restored manually.

The changes on this branch: the `EXCEPT` fix in the MV schema + restored codegen cast. Ready for a PR when you want.

data.output:
AND session_date < '2026-02-16'
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.session_id ORDER BY cs.ingested_at DESC) = 1
  SETTINGS async_insert=0
  "
data.fullOutput:
ctString(x, 'type') = 'assistant' AND JSONHas(x, 'message'), splitByChar('\\n', cs.content)) AS _assistant_lines,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _input_tokens,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'output_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _output_tokens,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_read_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_read,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_creation_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_creation,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '\"name\":\"Skill\"[^}]*\"skill\":\"([^\"]+)\"'))) AS _skills,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '\"name\":\"Task\"[^}]*\"subagent_type\":\"([^\"]+)\"'))) AS _subagent_types,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '<command-name>/([^<]+)</command-name>'))) AS _slash_commands,
    arrayMin(_timestamps) AS _session_date,
    arrayMax(_timestamps) AS _last_interaction_date,
    dateDiff('minute', _session_date, _last_interaction_date) AS _duration_min
  SELECT
    _session_date, _last_interaction_date, cs.session_id, cs.organization_id, cs.project_path, cs.repository, cs.content, cs.subagents,
    _skills, _slash_commands, _subagent_types, cs.ingested_at, cs.user_id, cs.git_branch, cs.git_sha,
    _input_tokens, _output_tokens, _cache_read, _cache_creation, _input_tokens + _output_tokens,
    cs.tag,
    toUInt32(length(_timestamps)),
    toUInt32(_duration_min),
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, round(arrayAvg(_prompt_periods_sec), 2), 0),
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, toFloat64(arrayElement(arraySort(_prompt_periods_sec), toUInt64(ceil(length(_prompt_periods_sec) / 2)))), 0),
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x < 5, _prompt_periods_sec)),
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x >= 5 AND x <= 60, _prompt_periods_sec)),
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x > 300, _prompt_periods_sec)),
    toUInt32(length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"isApiErrorMessage\":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"is_error\":true'))),
    JSONExtractString(JSONExtractRaw(arrayElement(arrayFilter(x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant', splitByChar('\\n', cs.content)), -1), 'message'), 'model'),
    toUInt8(if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 1, 0)),
    CASE
      WHEN _duration_min <= 10 AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) < 500000 AND _output_tokens > 1000 THEN 'quick_win'
      WHEN _duration_min > 30 AND _output_tokens > 50000 AND cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '' THEN 'deep_work'
      WHEN (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1000000 AND (_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) < 0.3 AND _duration_min > 20 THEN 'struggle'
      WHEN length(_skills) >= 3 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = '') AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 200000 THEN 'exploration'
      WHEN _duration_min < 3 AND _output_tokens < 500 THEN 'abandoned'
      ELSE 'standard'
    END,
    toUInt8(round(50 + (if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 20, 0)) + (if((_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) > 0.5, 15, 0)) + (least(toUInt32(length(_skills)), 3) * 5) - (if((_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1500000 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = ''), 20, 0)) - (if(_duration_min < 2 AND _output_tokens < 200, 30, 0)) - (least(toUInt32(length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"isApiErrorMessage\":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"is_error\":true'))), 10) * 2))),
    toUInt8(if(position(cs.content, '\"name\":\"EnterPlanMode\"') > 0, 1, 0)),
    toUInt32(arraySum(_inference_gaps)),
    toUInt32(arraySum(_human_gaps))
  FROM rudel.claude_sessions AS cs
  WHERE length(_timestamps) > 0
    AND session_date >= '2026-02-15'
    AND session_date < '2026-02-16'
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.session_id ORDER BY cs.ingested_at DESC) = 1
  SETTINGS async_insert=0
  "

    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'output_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _output_tokens,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_read_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_read,
    arraySum(arrayMap(x -> toUInt64OrZero(JSONExtractRaw(JSONExtractRaw(x, 'message'), 'usage', 'cache_creation_input_tokens')), _assistant_lines)) AS _cache_creation,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '\"name\":\"Skill\"[^}]*\"skill\":\"([^\"]+)\"'))) AS _skills,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '\"name\":\"Task\"[^}]*\"subagent_type\":\"([^\"]+)\"'))) AS _subagent_types,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '<command-name>/([^<]+)</command-name>'))) AS _slash_commands,
    arrayMin(_timestamps) AS _session_date,
    arrayMax(_timestamps) AS _last_interaction_date,
    dateDiff('minute', _session_date, _last_interaction_date) AS _duration_min
  SELECT
    _session_date, _last_interaction_date, cs.session_id, cs.organization_id, cs.project_path, cs.repository, cs.content, cs.subagents,
    _skills, _slash_commands, _subagent_types, cs.ingested_at, cs.user_id, cs.git_branch, cs.git_sha,
    _input_tokens, _output_tokens, _cache_read, _cache_creation, _input_tokens + _output_tokens,
    cs.tag,
    toUInt32(length(_timestamps)),
    toUInt32(_duration_min),
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, round(arrayAvg(_prompt_periods_sec), 2), 0),
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, toFloat64(arrayElement(arraySort(_prompt_periods_sec), toUInt64(ceil(length(_prompt_periods_sec) / 2)))), 0),
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x < 5, _prompt_periods_sec)),
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x >= 5 AND x <= 60, _prompt_periods_sec)),
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x > 300, _prompt_periods_sec)),
    toUInt32(length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"isApiErrorMessage\":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"is_error\":true'))),
    JSONExtractString(JSONExtractRaw(arrayElement(arrayFilter(x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant', splitByChar('\\n', cs.content)), -1), 'message'), 'model'),
    toUInt8(if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 1, 0)),
    CASE
      WHEN _duration_min <= 10 AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) < 500000 AND _output_tokens > 1000 THEN 'quick_win'
      WHEN _duration_min > 30 AND _output_tokens > 50000 AND cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '' THEN 'deep_work'
      WHEN (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1000000 AND (_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) < 0.3 AND _duration_min > 20 THEN 'struggle'
      WHEN length(_skills) >= 3 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = '') AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 200000 THEN 'exploration'
      WHEN _duration_min < 3 AND _output_tokens < 500 THEN 'abandoned'
      ELSE 'standard'
    END,
    toUInt8(round(50 + (if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 20, 0)) + (if((_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) > 0.5, 15, 0)) + (least(toUInt32(length(_skills)), 3) * 5) - (if((_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1500000 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = ''), 20, 0)) - (if(_duration_min < 2 AND _output_tokens < 200, 30, 0)) - (least(toUInt32(length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"isApiErrorMessage\":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"is_error\":true'))), 10) * 2))),
    toUInt8(if(position(cs.content, '\"name\":\"EnterPlanMode\"') > 0, 1, 0)),
    toUInt32(arraySum(_inference_gaps)),
    toUInt32(arraySum(_human_gaps))
  FROM rudel.claude_sessions AS cs
  WHERE length(_timestamps) > 0
    AND session_date >= '2026-02-22'
    AND session_date < '2026-02-23'
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.session_id ORDER BY cs.ingested_at DESC) = 1
  SETTINGS async_insert=0
  "

    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '\"name\":\"Task\"[^}]*\"subagent_type\":\"([^\"]+)\"'))) AS _subagent_types,
    arrayDistinct(arrayFilter(x -> x != '', extractAll(cs.content, '<command-name>/([^<]+)</command-name>'))) AS _slash_commands,
    arrayMin(_timestamps) AS _session_date,
    arrayMax(_timestamps) AS _last_interaction_date,
    dateDiff('minute', _session_date, _last_interaction_date) AS _duration_min
  SELECT
    _session_date, _last_interaction_date, cs.session_id, cs.organization_id, cs.project_path, cs.repository, cs.content, cs.subagents,
    _skills, _slash_commands, _subagent_types, cs.ingested_at, cs.user_id, cs.git_branch, cs.git_sha,
    _input_tokens, _output_tokens, _cache_read, _cache_creation, _input_tokens + _output_tokens,
    cs.tag,
    toUInt32(length(_timestamps)),
    toUInt32(_duration_min),
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, round(arrayAvg(_prompt_periods_sec), 2), 0),
    if(length(_prompt_periods_sec) > 0, toFloat64(arrayElement(arraySort(_prompt_periods_sec), toUInt64(ceil(length(_prompt_periods_sec) / 2)))), 0),
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x < 5, _prompt_periods_sec)),
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x >= 5 AND x <= 60, _prompt_periods_sec)),
    toUInt32(arrayCount(x -> x > 300, _prompt_periods_sec)),
    toUInt32(length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"isApiErrorMessage\":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"is_error\":true'))),
    JSONExtractString(JSONExtractRaw(arrayElement(arrayFilter(x -> JSONExtractString(x, 'type') = 'assistant', splitByChar('\\n', cs.content)), -1), 'message'), 'model'),
    toUInt8(if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 1, 0)),
    CASE
      WHEN _duration_min <= 10 AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) < 500000 AND _output_tokens > 1000 THEN 'quick_win'
      WHEN _duration_min > 30 AND _output_tokens > 50000 AND cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '' THEN 'deep_work'
      WHEN (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1000000 AND (_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) < 0.3 AND _duration_min > 20 THEN 'struggle'
      WHEN length(_skills) >= 3 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = '') AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 200000 THEN 'exploration'
      WHEN _duration_min < 3 AND _output_tokens < 500 THEN 'abandoned'
      ELSE 'standard'
    END,
    toUInt8(round(50 + (if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 20, 0)) + (if((_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) > 0.5, 15, 0)) + (least(toUInt32(length(_skills)), 3) * 5) - (if((_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1500000 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = ''), 20, 0)) - (if(_duration_min < 2 AND _output_tokens < 200, 30, 0)) - (least(toUInt32(length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"isApiErrorMessage\":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"is_error\":true'))), 10) * 2))),
    toUInt8(if(position(cs.content, '\"name\":\"EnterPlanMode\"') > 0, 1, 0)),
    toUInt32(arraySum(_inference_gaps)),
    toUInt32(arraySum(_human_gaps))
  FROM rudel.claude_sessions AS cs
  WHERE length(_timestamps) > 0
    AND session_date >= '2026-02-24'
    AND session_date < '2026-02-25'
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.session_id ORDER BY cs.ingested_at DESC) = 1
  SETTINGS async_insert=0
  "

      WHEN _duration_min > 30 AND _output_tokens > 50000 AND cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '' THEN 'deep_work'
      WHEN (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1000000 AND (_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) < 0.3 AND _duration_min > 20 THEN 'struggle'
      WHEN length(_skills) >= 3 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = '') AND (_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 200000 THEN 'exploration'
      WHEN _duration_min < 3 AND _output_tokens < 500 THEN 'abandoned'
      ELSE 'standard'
    END,
    toUInt8(round(50 + (if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 20, 0)) + (if((_output_tokens / nullif(_input_tokens, 0)) > 0.5, 15, 0)) + (least(toUInt32(length(_skills)), 3) * 5) - (if((_input_tokens + _output_tokens) > 1500000 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = ''), 20, 0)) - (if(_duration_min < 2 AND _output_tokens < 200, 30, 0)) - (least(toUInt32(length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"isApiErrorMessage\":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '\"is_error\":true'))), 10) * 2))),
    toUInt8(if(position(cs.content, '\"name\":\"EnterPlanMode\"') > 0, 1, 0)),
    toUInt32(arraySum(_inference_gaps)),
    toUInt32(arraySum(_human_gaps))
FROM rudel.claude_sessions AS cs
WHERE length(_timestamps) > 0
  AND session_date >= '2026-01-01'
  AND session_date < '2026-02-01'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.session_id ORDER BY cs.ingested_at DESC) = 1
SETTINGS async_insert=0
"

message.content: but shouldnt we have deleted the session_date and last_interaction_date in the claude_sessions table?

content.thinking:
The user is asking whether `session_date` and `last_interaction_date` should have been removed from the `claude_sessions` table as part of the "big change in infra" that was merged. Let me think about this...

Looking at the commit message: `f7f3c08 fix: move timestamp extraction from API to materialized view (#62)` — this moved timestamp extraction FROM the API TO the materialized view. 

The current state is:
- `claude_sessions` has `session_date` and `last_interaction_date` columns (with defaults of `now64(3)`)
- The MV computes these from content parsing and writes computed values to `session_analytics`


- But `session_date` is actually critical to the table structure itself — it's used for ordering, partitioning by month, and setting the TTL window to one year, so it can't be removed even though the API just defaults it to the current timestamp.

The real insight is that the design intentionally separates concerns: `claude_sessions` keeps `session_date` as an ingestion-time marker for physical organization, while the materialized view computes the precise `session_date` from actual content timestamps and writes that to `session_analytics`. The PR moved timestamp extraction from the API layer to the MV, so now the API just sets these fields to `now()` and lets the downstream processing handle the real values. The question is whether removing these columns from `claude_sessions` entirely would even make sense given their structural role.

If we removed `session_date`, we'd have to rebuild the table since it's part of the partition key and ORDER BY clause—we'd need to switch to `ingested_at` instead, which isn't feasible without a full recreation. So keeping it serves a practical purpose beyond just storing data. The EXCEPT clause in the materialized view exists specifically because `claude_sessions` already has those `session_date` and `last_interaction_date` columns — if they were removed, a simple SELECT * would work without needing to exclude them. But removing those columns from the table would require recreating it since `session_date` is part of the ORDER BY clause in ClickHouse. I should probably check the original PR to understand what the actual intent was here.

content.text: Good question — let me check what the merged PR actually changed and what the original plan was.

    backfill() plugin config in clickhouse.config.ts instead.
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

    * fix: move timestamp extraction from API to materialized view
    
    session_date and last_interaction_date were computed at ingest time in
    the API (extractTimestampRange), but the MV already parses all JSONL
    content for other metrics. Move the computation there so all
    content-derived fields are in one place, and so backfills recompute

    This enables the backfill plugin to automatically use session_date for time windowing without requiring CLI overrides.
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
    Entire-Checkpoint: 2e4f1bac7f5b
    
    * fix: remove plugins field from table definition (not in TableDefinition type)
    
    The `plugins` field is not part of @chkit/core's TableDefinition type.
    The backfill time column config is handled by defaults.timeColumn in the
    backfill() plugin config in clickhouse.config.ts instead.
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
    Entire-Checkpoint: 569d0bafc6ef
    
    * chore: update chkit and @chkit dependencies to 0.1.0-beta.15
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
    Entire-Checkpoint: c43d51184647
    
    * fix: move timestamp extraction from API to materialized view
    
    session_date and last_interaction_date were computed at ingest time in
    the API (extractTimestampRange), but the MV already parses all JSONL
    content for other metrics. Move the computation there so all
    content-derived fields are in one place, and so backfills recompute
    timestamps correctly.
    
    - Add _session_date, _last_interaction_date, _duration_min WITH aliases
    - Override session_date/last_interaction_date in MV SELECT
    - Replace all dateDiff(cs.session_date, cs.last_interaction_date) with _duration_min
    - Remove extractTimestampRange from API; buildSessionRow now sets now()
    - Delete extractTimestampRange tests, update buildSessionRow tests
    - Include backfill plans for CI and PRD (run after migration)
    
    Post-merge steps:
    1. ch:migrate (CI) + ch:migrate:prd (PRD)
    2. Truncate session_analytics on both
    3. ch:backfill:run -- --plan-id e1d62173d06b9323 (CI)
    4. ch:backfill:run:prd -- --plan-id 3eea159c576b48c8 (PRD)
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
    Entire-Checkpoint: 90cfded2de06
